name: <OnCorruptEthernetPacket>
title: <OnCorruptEthernetPacket>
syntax: void <OnCorruptEthernetPacket>( long channel, long errorCode, long packetLength );
description: This callback function is called when a corrupt Ethernet packet is received.
Within this callback function the following functions can be used to retrieve the received packet data:
The functions access the raw Ethernet data. Offset 0 starts at the beginning of the Ethernet header.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Ethernet channel number of the adapter that has been changed.
